title: Docker in 5 Minutes — Full Tutorial

script.text: Welcome back. Today I will show you exactly how to set up Docker in five minutes. Step one: install Docker Desktop from the official website. Step two: verify the installation by running docker dash dash version in your terminal. Step three: run your first container with docker run hello dash world. And that is it. You now have Docker running locally. Follow for more dev tips every day.
